name: ibbytech-marketplace
description: IbbyTech shared Claude Code framework — scoped sub-agents, guardrail hooks, git discipline, and platform MCP connectors, distributed to all IbbyTech repos from one source.

plugins.name: ibbytech-core
plugins.description: Shared baseline: planner/implementer/reviewer-validator/docs sub-agents, mixed-posture guardrail hooks (hard-block safety, soft-warn process), two-commit git discipline, and bundled platform MCP connectors.
